---
title: Platform
---

Site reliability metrics for the CanadaLogin platform, in the `sre` schema.
Currently incident-response metrics, with other reliability measures to follow.

The relevant tables are:

- [`sre.mttr_current`](../catalog/sre.qmd#mttr_current) - latest state of every incident, one row per incident
- [`sre.mttr_history`](../catalog/sre.qmd#mttr_history) - dated snapshots of every incident, preserving how each evolved

These tables come from a hand-maintained spreadsheet; see the catalog
[Data quality](../catalog/sre.qmd#data-quality) note for caveats. The one that
shapes most queries here: the incident timestamps (`detected_at`, `resolved_at`,
and so on) are stored as America/Toronto strings, not native dates, so a
reporting window filters on the `YYYY-MM-DD` prefix of `detected_at` rather than
a `from_date` column.

## Incident Response Metrics

{{< include sre/mean-time-to-resolution.qmd >}}
